text:
Created attachment 229037
Version of the patch that passed tinderbox

This is the updated version of the patch, with only changes against the original
version are:
- syntax error in ld128 fixed (mised ';')
- addition of .c files moved under .if ${LDBL_PREC} != 53

Please state if you are fine with committing this one
